eng.definition: showing a casual and cheerful indifference considered to be callous or improper
examples: They were blithe to the struggles of their less fortunate neighbors.
His blithe attitude towards his homework concerned his parents.
Despite the hardships, she maintained a blithe spirit.

hin.definition: An attempt or effort to do something
examples: मैंने उसे समझाने का प्रयास किया.
तुम्हें अपने लक्ष्यों को प्राप्त करने का प्रयास करना होगा.
यह एक प्रयास है विश्वास और स्वाभिमान को बढ़ाने का.
